locations.name: forest
locations.description:
You are deep in the forest, overwhelmed by the silence.
The sun has completely disappeared behind the treetops, leaving you in the darkness.
Your eyes slowly adjust to the gloom.
Suddenly, the silence is broken by the hoot of an owl.
A shiver runs down your spine.
You want to get out of here as quickly as possible.
To the east and south, the dark forest stretches on.
Looking west, you see bubbling sludge on the ground and smell the stench of a swamp.
What do you do?

locations.name: forest
locations.description:
The forest around you is quiet and dark, with tall trees reaching high above.
Their branches sway gently, and the air smells of moss and wet earth.
Faint light slips through the leaves, creating pale spots on the ground.
You hear the soft rustling of animals moving nearby and the distant croak of frogs.
To the west, the trees grow thick and close together and an old path covered in vines stretches into the darkness.
To the south, there is a faint glimmer of water, maybe a stream or pond.
There could be a bridge there. To the east, the forest opens up to a smelly swamp.
As you come closer the croak of the frogs intensifies.
What do you do?

description.monster alive:
The air is thick and foul, reeking of decay.
Muddy pools bubble around you, and twisted trees rise from the swamp, their roots visible through water.
Insects buzz faintly, and you hear splashes from something moving in the water and croaking of frogs.
A monstrous figure comes out of the mist.
Its body is covered in slimy scales, with long claws that shimmer in the faint light.
Its glowing yellow eyes seem to pierce through the fog, watching your every move.
Rows of sharp teeth are visible and a low growl rumbles from its chest.
To the west and east, the swamp fades into a forest, dark and quiet.
To the south, you can just make out the distant lights of a city.
The swamp feels dangerous and alive, every shadow shifting.
What do you do?
description.monster dead:
The air is thick and foul, reeking of decay.
Muddy pools bubble around you, and twisted trees rise from the swamp, their roots visible through water.
Insects buzz faintly, and you hear splashes from something moving in the water and croaking of frogs.
To the west and east, the swamp fades into a forest, dark and quiet.
To the south, you can just make out the distant lights of a city.
The swamp feels dangerous and alive, every shadow shifting.
What do you do?

locations.name: forest
locations.description:
All around you, there are only trees.
In the distance, you hear wolves howling and birds chirping.
Blades of grass rustle as the wind brushes past them, whistling softly.
The last rays of sunlight struggle to pierce through the treetops, gently grazing your face.
A chill wraps around your light clothing.
To the north stretches a forest, with a path worn down by travelers.
Looking west, you can make out the outlines of city buildings and hear the faint laughter of children.
Turning south, you see a massive cave that looks like a gaping abyss.
What do you do?

description.monster alive:
You hear the soft murmur of a stream.
In front of you stands a small bridge made of uneven stones.
It looks very old, and you worry about its stability, as you step on it.
At the northern end of the bridge, the forest stretches on,
while at the southern end stands an old tavern, from which loud shouts of joy can be heard.
Suddenly, you see a massive creature, half-covered in fur and half in feathers.
Its terrifying claws are smeared with blood, and its fangs, too large to fit in its mouth, stick out and shimmer in the sunlight.
You've never seen a monster like this in your life.
Curious, could there be something in the pouch tied to its side?
Can you defeat it?
What do you do?
description.monster dead:
You hear the soft murmur of a stream.
In front of you stands a small bridge made of uneven stones.
It looks very old, and you worry about its stability, as you step on it.
At the northern end of the bridge, the forest stretches on,
while at the southern end stands an old tavern, from which loud shouts of joy can be heard.
What do you do?

locations.name: city
locations.description:
You enter the city market, where the air is filled with the smells of fresh bread, roasting meat, and sweet spices.
Stalls line the streets, colorful awnings offering shade to the merchants and their goods.
To your left, a butcher sells cuts of meat, and to your right, a spice vendor offers bags of fragrant herbs.
A few steps further, a baker pulls warm pastries from his oven, and children run through the crowd, laughing and playing.
Merchants shout out their prices, hoping to catch your attention.
A light odor comes from the swamp north of you.
To the east a quiet forest stretches on.
Inviting you with a path.
To the south you can hear more conversations and laughter of children.
Another beautiful part of the city is visible.
The market is busy and alive with energy.
What do you do?

description.monster alive:
You step into the cave where the air is cold and damp.
The space ahead is very narrow with uneven ground and the sound of dripping water echoing around you.
Suddenly, a low growl shakes the walls.
From the shadows, a massive creature emerges, with its thick fur perfectly clean.
Its glowing red eyes lock onto you as it growls, revealing sharp teeth.
Its massive claws scrape the ground as it steps closer, its presence filling the cave.
You notice countless human bones lying all around you.
This might be the deadliest beast you have encountered.
The only way out is to the north, where daylight reaches the forest.
What do you do?
description.monster dead:
You step into the cave where the air is cold and damp.
The space ahead is very narrow with uneven ground, and the sound of dripping water echoes around you.
The cave feels too quiet.
As you move forward, you notice countless human bones scattered across the ground,
some half-buried in the earth, others barely visible in the dim light.
The weight of the atmosphere is overwhelming, as though the cave itself is holding its breath.
The path continues deeper into the shadows, but the only way out is to the north,
where daylight filters through the caves mouth into the forest beyond.
The fresh air from outside feels like a distant memory.
What do you do?

locations.name: tavern
locations.description:
You see a large wooden building with a sign that reads The Drunk Duck.
As you step inside you are greeted by a wave of warmth and the scent of alcohol.
It's incredibly loud and you can barely squeeze through the bustling servers carrying venison and beer and men occupying every table.
A man in the corner with a sour expression watches you intently.
His large belly is barely covered by clothes adorned with expensive gemstones.
At his belt hangs a pouch that jingles merrily with every movement. You recognize in him the famous trader from the city.
As you left the door open behind you (north) you see another entrance on the east side of the tavern.
What do you do?

locations.name: city
locations.description:
You stand in the middle of a large cobblestone square.
Surrounding you are wooden buildings with stone foundations, some two or three stories high, providing shelter for the local people.
In front of you, children run by, laughing as they play tag.
Behind you, you hear the clatter of hooves from a carriage and the neighing of a horse.
To the west, there's a tavern, and you can hear its owner arguing with someone in the alley.
To the north, rows of houses stretch further, marking a bustling, lively city.
To the south, all you hear is the distant, bubbling swamp, uninhabited and silent.
What do you do?
